prompt: A photorealistic street style paparazzi shot of a young woman walking through a {argument name="setting" default="sunny parking lot"}. She has {argument name="hair color and style" default="blonde hair in a high ponytail"} and is wearing {argument name="accessory" default="black rectangular sunglasses"}. Her outfit consists of a matching {argument name="activewear color" default="grey"} long-sleeve crop top and high-waisted leggings, paired with chunky white sneakers and white crew socks. Over her left arm, she carries a light blue denim jacket, while holding a {argument name="held item" default="beige insulated water bottle"} and a smartphone in the same hand. The background is blurred with a shallow depth of field, showing the rear of a dark car on the left and out-of-focus buildings and trees in the distance, capturing a casual, candid athleisure aesthetic in bright daylight.
translatedPrompt: 一张写实的街拍风格照片，拍摄了一位年轻女性走在 {argument name="setting" default="阳光明媚的停车场"} 中。她留着 {argument name="hair color and style" default="金色高马尾"}，戴着 {argument name="accessory" default="黑色长方形墨镜"}。她身穿一套 {argument name="activewear color" default="灰色"} 长袖短款上衣和高腰紧身裤，搭配厚底白色运动鞋和白色中筒袜。她的左臂上搭着一件浅蓝色牛仔外套，手中拿着 {argument name="held item" default="米色保温水杯"} 和一部智能手机。背景采用浅景深虚化处理，左侧可见一辆深色汽车的尾部，远处是模糊的建筑和树木，在明亮的日光下呈现出随性、自然的运动休闲美感。

breakdown.creativeCore: 运动休闲街拍风格照片：生成一张写实的、抓拍风格的女性户外运动装街拍图像。
breakdown.subject: 产品
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 游戏角色、IP 形象、Cosplay、职业角色设定

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, photorealistic]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: shallow depth, depth of field]。

Text requirements:
[是否含文字/精确文字/可读性要求]。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
